comments.author: CWR
comments.text: We just need to figure out how to pay for it. I think it would be funny, this is inspired by the Sacko/Ruxin last place trophy from the league.

comments.author: GSA
comments.text: This is done, Anagh is in possession. Loser.

comments.author: GSA
comments.text: I've made us a website, you probably already know: qpfl.org

comments.author: SLS
comments.text: Would be fun to have a set of superlative awards that mean nothing but get recognized. Examples: best trader, worst trader, funniest trader, best memes, worst memes, most volatile, most crippled, biggest disappointment, most improved, best team move, worst team move, etc.

comments.author: CWR
comments.text: Awards are given at the next draft and each winner gets a fireball shot.

comments.author: GSA
comments.text: How do we determine the entries/winners? What categories are we going to have?
